items.prompt: matches quadratic relationships across table, graph, expression, and area-model forms and solves simple factored cases
items.expected_evidence: match quadratic expressions, area models, tables, and parabolic graphs representing the same relationship
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner preserves the same quadratic structure across bounded representations and simple solve tasks.

items.prompt: explains how vertex, symmetry, and zeros appear in an introductory quadratic relationship
items.expected_evidence: explain introductory vertex, symmetry, and zero meaning in graphical or contextual form
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner explains quadratic features as properties of one relationship rather than disconnected labels.

items.prompt: Diagnose a peer error aligned to zero_solution_confusion.
items.expected_evidence: solve simple quadratics in factored or area-linked forms and verify candidate solutions
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies how the peer confused zeros, factors, or verified solutions.

items.prompt: recognizes quadratic structure in a less-familiar contextual, tabular, or geometric setting
items.expected_evidence: recognize non-constant first differences and connect them to quadratic growth in bounded tables
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner distinguishes quadratic structure from linear or unrelated patterns in a varied setting.
